name: ANDBLK
description: SuperBlock containing an AND gate with 2 clock inputs and 1 clock output

internalStructure.description: SuperBlock containing an AND gate with 2 clock inputs and 1 clock output

ports.note: Ports defined by internal SuperBlock structure via CLKIN_f and CLKOUT_f

xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="ANDBLK" blockType="h" simulationFunctionName="csuper" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="ANDBLK">
  <SuperBlockDiagram as="child" background="-1" gridEnabled="1" title="">
    <mxGraphModel as="model">
      <root>
        <!-- Internal blocks: ANDLOG_f, CLKIN_f, CLKOUT_f, IFTHEL_f, CLKSPLIT_f -->
      </root>
    </mxGraphModel>
  </SuperBlockDiagram>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="100.0" y="100.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Ports are defined by CLKIN_f and CLKOUT_f internal blocks
Cannot be used directly for code generation
No explicit ports at top level - all connectivity is internal
criticalRules: Ports are defined by CLKIN_f and CLKOUT_f internal blocks
Cannot be used directly for code generation
